summary: Maps a customer-specific system into one of the canonical Backstory contracts without changing the reusable workflow logic.

required_env.name: EXAMPLE_API_BASE_URL
required_env.description: Base URL for the source system or proxy endpoint.

required_env.name: EXAMPLE_API_TOKEN
required_env.description: Secret used to authenticate the source system.

mapping_files.purpose: Maps source fields to the canonical output contract.

fixtures.notes: Use golden fixtures so new customers can validate the adapter before wiring live data.

notes: Keep vendor-specific auth, field paths, and fallback logic inside the pack.
Do not edit reusable workflow JSON to compensate for a missing adapter pack.
